description:
You are a Senior Software Developer responsible for the data isolation layer of a multi-tenant SaaS platform. A security audit has revealed critical data isolation failures in the SAAS_PLATFORM schema (saas_admin/SaaS2024, XEPDB1, localhost:1521). Tenants (tenant1_user, tenant2_user, tenant3_user) are currently able to access unauthorized data.

Resolve the security vulnerabilities within the Virtual Private Database (VPD) implementation. Ensure the TENANT_ISOLATION_POLICY function on the CUSTOMER_DATA table correctly enforces isolation based on the application context. Implement a VPD policy on the FINANCIAL_RECORDS table using DBMS_RLS.ADD_POLICY. Configure the TENANT_CTX application context package to default to a non-existent tenant (tenant_id = -1) when no context is set.

Create a security audit framework consisting of a table named SECURITY_AUDIT_LOG, a view named CROSS_TENANT_VIOLATION_VW for detecting isolation violations, and a stored procedure named PROC_SECURITY_AUDIT_REPORT that performs cross-tenant query tests and logs results. Verify that data isolation is fully restored across all protected tables for all tenants.

injected_flaws.broken_policy_function: Returns NULL predicate instead of tenant_id filter
injected_flaws.missing_policy: FINANCIAL_RECORDS table has no VPD policy
